arts.sum: Barcelona have announced that they have reached an agreement with Nike over a new €1.7 billion kit sponsorship deal. Despite public differences between the club and the American company, the two have agreed to put pen to paper on a lucrative new deal for the Catalans, which will go a long way towards providing the necessary funds to put them back on an even keel financially.

arts.ttl: Barcelona pair sit out training before Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Two leading members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona were absent from the club’s group training session on Saturday. As much was confirmed by head coach Hansi…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star overtakes Barcelona counterpart in La Liga scoring charts
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. this afternoon continued his ascent up the goalscoring charts in La Liga. Real, of course, are fresh off securing a return to winning ways, at…

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Real Sociedad - La Liga
arts.sum: Predicting how Barcelona could line up for their La Liga clash against Real Sociedad on Sunday evening.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona announce new Nike kit agreement
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Saturday at long last announced an agreement on the terms of a new contract with kit manufacturer Nike. The subject of the long-running negotiations…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'hatch swap deal plan' to beat Chelsea to Karim Adeyemi transfer next summer
arts.sum: Barcelona could offer Spanish attacker Ferran Torres to Borussia Dortmund as part of a potential deal for Karim Adeyemi, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Barça sign Nike deal, hope to ease financial woes
arts.sum: LaLiga giants Barcelona have announced a new multi-year agreement with kit supplier Nike which will help to further alleviate their financial problems.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides final Pau Cubarsí injury update before Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided an update on the wellbeing of star defender Pau Cubarsí. This of course comes amid ongoing uncertainty when it comes to the youngster’s…

arts.ttl: Williams reveals how 'B*STARD' Yamal tried to lure him to Barcelona
arts.sum: Nico Williams has joked about how the 'b*stards' Lamine Yamal and Alejandro Balde tried to convince him to join Barcelona this summer. Speaking to La Revuelta about this summer's protracted transfer saga, the 22-year-old joked about how good friends and Spain teammates Lamine Yamal and Alejandro Balde tried to recruit him for Barcelona.
